description: ssiamb maps the reads back to the assembly, calls variants with BBTools, groups same-position VCF records, and counts ambiguous SNV loci using depth and minor allele frequency thresholds.

function.cmd: ssiamb self --r1 reads_R1.fastq.gz --r2 reads_R2.fastq.gz --assembly assembly.fasta --sample SAMPLE --outdir outputs

name: ssiamb
